title: NASA Finds City on Mars
text: Astronauts discovered a hidden city with green buildings and flying cars under the Martian surface yesterday.

title: Federal Reserve Raises Rates
text: The central bank increased interest rates by 25 basis points today to combat rising inflation across the country.

title: Local Man Grows Money Tree
text: A gardener in Ohio claims he planted a dollar bill and now harvests $100 bills every morning from a tree.

title: Tech Giant Announces New Phone
text: The latest smartphone features a 48-hour battery life and a titanium frame for better durability and performance.

title: Secret Cure for All Diseases Found
text: Doctors revealed a magic potion made of lemon and salt that cures every known illness instantly without medicine.

title: Election Results Confirmed
text: The electoral commission has finalized the vote count and declared the official winner of the regional race.

title: Aliens To Visit Earth Tomorrow
text: A leaked document from the government says a massive UFO will land in New York City at noon tomorrow.

title: Stock Market Hits Record High
text: Investors are celebrating as the Dow Jones Industrial Average reached its highest point in history today.

title: Celebrity Secretly a Robot
text: A makeup artist claims a famous actor's skin peeled off to reveal metal wires and circuit boards during filming.

title: New Study on Coffee Benefits
text: Researchers found that drinking two cups of coffee a day can improve heart health and boost memory functions.

title: Man Wins Lottery 10 Times in Row
text: A lucky player used a secret mathematical formula to win the jackpot ten times in a single week in Las Vegas.

title: Climate Accord Signed by Nations
text: Leaders from 50 countries met in Geneva to sign a new agreement aimed at reducing carbon emissions by 2030.
